name: tesseract
description: Tesseract design system for Claude: the /tesseract page-building skill (brand, EMR page principles, component catalog, domain intake) plus the tesseract MCP (exact components, props, tokens, icons + a validate_usage guardrail). The MCP is the HOSTED server — always the latest, auto-updated when a new Tesseract version ships; no local copy to go stale.
